sarah-mitchell.name: Dr. Sarah Mitchell
sarah-mitchell.title: Health Science Editor
sarah-mitchell.bio: Dr. Sarah Mitchell holds a Ph.D. in Dermatological Sciences and has spent over a decade researching the effects of environmental factors on hair and skin health. She specializes in mineral-related scalp conditions and water quality impacts on personal care. Her work has been cited in peer-reviewed trichology journals.
sarah-mitchell.credentials: Ph.D. Dermatological Sciences, Certified Trichology Researcher

james-walker.name: James Walker
james-walker.title: Wellness & Nutrition Writer
james-walker.bio: James Walker is a health and wellness journalist with eight years of experience covering nutrition science, natural remedies, and evidence-based hair care. He focuses on translating complex research into practical guidance for everyday readers.
james-walker.credentials: B.Sc. Nutrition Science, Health Journalism Certificate
